title: Simple tree harvester
description: Simple tree harvester that passes player data.
body:
# Simple Tree Harvester

A lightweight Fabric mod that lets you chop down entire trees in one go. Simply sneak and break a log with an axe, and the whole tree will fall from top to bottom.

## How It Works

When you break a log while sneaking, the mod automatically detects the rest of the tree — trunk and foliage — and breaks it cleanly, passing player data for every block. This means compatibility with enchantments, drops, advancements, and other mods that rely on player interactions.

## Why This Mod?

Most tree harvesters skip small step: they don’t pass player context when breaking blocks.
This mod fixes that. Every block broken behaves as if the player did it themselves, ensuring better mod compatibility and a more consistent experience.

## Configuration

- ``maxLogs``: Maximum "Logs" that can be in a tree **128 by default**
- ``maxFoliage``: Maximum "Foliage" that can be in a tree **512 by default**
- ``disableLimits``: Disables limits on maximum amount of Logs and Foliage we can break **false be default** 
- ``maxRadius``: x/z bounds of a "tree" **8 by default**
- ``maxVertical``: Maximum vertical size of the tree **48 by default**
- ``clumpDrops``: Try to clump dropped blocks at origin point to reduce lag **false by default**
- ``placeItemsInInventory``: Try to place items in players inventory if possible **false by default**
- ``requireFoliageAlongTrunk``: Decides if a "Tree" must have foliage attached **true by default**
- ``minLeaves``: Minimum leaves that need to be attached to trunk to qualify it as a "Tree" **3 by default**
- ``breakOverworldLeaves``: Decides if it will break basic leaf blocks **false by default**
- ``breakNetherWartAndShroomlight``: Decides if it will break nether "leaf" blocks **false by default**
- ``breakMushroomCaps``: Decides if it will break mushroom "leaves" **false by default**
- ``breakChorusFlowers``: Decides if it will break chorus flowers **false by default**
- ``foliageSeedNeighborRadius``: Radius where foliage checked for breaking, limit exist to prevent excessive leaf removal **1 by default**
